Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

this submission contains two large patches from two authors under two organizations.  i would like to see the following: 
1. the class name should match with the repo path.  otherwise we will have problem deploying built artifacts to LF Nexus maven.  for example  universalvesadapter should be under src/java/org/onap/dcaegen2/services/mapper/universalvesadapter, not src/java/org/onap/universalvesadapter.  
2. the first patch submitter providing a review on the second patch; 
3. more descriptive commit message
4. the license header of each file should reflect which organization(s) been working on the file.  If more than one companies, then add multiple copyright lines for example:
Copyright (c) 2018 TechMahindra
Copyright (c) 2018 Nokia

Patch Set 1:

> this submission contains two large patches from two authors under
 > two organizations.  i would like to see the following:
 > 1. the class name should match with the repo path.  otherwise we
 > will have problem deploying built artifacts to LF Nexus maven.  for
 > example  universalvesadapter should be under src/java/org/onap/dcaegen2/services/mapper/universalvesadapter,
 > not src/java/org/onap/universalvesadapter.
 > 2. the first patch submitter providing a review on the second
 > patch;
 > 3. more descriptive commit message
 > 4. the license header of each file should reflect which
 > organization(s) been working on the file.  If more than one
 > companies, then add multiple copyright lines for example:
 > Copyright (c) 2018 TechMahindra
 > Copyright (c) 2018 Nokia


1. Currently our class packaging is like this.
src/main/java/org.onap.universalvesadapter.adapter.UniversalEventAdapter

Suggestion is to change it to like below. Kindly confirm.
src/main/java/org.onap.dcaegen2.services.mapper.universalvesadapter.adapter.UniversalEventAdapter

2. Removed Pooja's name (patch submitter) from reviewer list.

3. Ok, will take care of it.

4. Both the patch submissions are from same organization i.e. Tech Mahindra.
In UniversalEventAdapter, we have borrowed few classes from TCA project in consultation with Vijay. For these classes, we have not changed the license header. Is that ok?
Change has been successfully merged by Lusheng Ji
